items.title: [COLOR khaki]Xumo Play VOD Requires Widevine[/COLOR]
items.link: message/Xumo Play on demand movies and episodes may use Widevine DRM. Use the InputStream Helper link below to install or configure Widevine.
items.summary: Some Xumo Play VOD streams require Widevine DRM support.

items.title: [COLOR khaki]The Roku Channel VOD Requires Widevine[/COLOR]
items.link: message/Roku Channel playback uses Widevine DRM. Use the InputStream Helper link below to install or configure Widevine.
items.summary: Roku Channel TV episodes and some free streams require Widevine DRM support.
